markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.153 — Application for Title for Stolen or Concealed Vehicle

A person commits an offense if the person applies for a title for a motor vehicle that the person knows is stolen or concealed in violation of Section 32.33 (Hindering Secured Creditors) , Penal Code.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 64, eff. January 1, 2012.*
